short_description: Download & Save Perfectgirls Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Perfectgirls Downloader is a browser extension designed for users who want to save videos from Perfect Girls, a beauty-focused gallery showcase destination. The extension works with the site's distinctive /video/ / page structure, navigating through the embedded iframe playback layer to detect available media streams. It provides a straightforward way to export supported content as MP4 files.

faqs.question: Does this extension work on all Perfect Girls pages?
faqs.answer: It is designed for video pages that follow the /video/ / route pattern and use an iframe for playback. Other page types may not be supported.

faqs.question: What video formats can I download?
faqs.answer: The extension detects m3u8 and mp4 streams based on the available stream hints. The output is saved as MP4.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on how many videos I can download?
faqs.answer: You get three free trial downloads. A paid license unlocks unlimited downloads.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.answer: Yes, you sign in with your email using a one-time password. No credit card is needed for the trial.

faqs.question: Can I use this extension on other websites?
faqs.answer: No, Perfectgirls Downloader is built specifically for the Perfect Girls.xxx domain and its video page structure.

why: Perfect Girls is not a typical short-video or phone-first destination. It presents itself as a curated visual catalog with a polished gallery feel, set apart by its recognizable.xxx identity. The site uses a clean numeric route pattern for its video pages, which makes each page easy to identify and reference. However, the playback layer adds complexity — videos play through an embedded iframe, which can make direct saving difficult without the right tool.

This extension is built around the exact page structure Perfect Girls uses. It understands the /video/ / route pattern and knows to look for media within the embedded player layer. Rather than promising a fully polished extractor, Perfectgirls Downloader offers a grounded approach based on the stream hints available — m3u8 and mp4 — so you can save videos you have permission to keep with reasonable expectations.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open Perfect Girls and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Open your browser and navigate to a Perfect Girls video page with a URL like ``.
Wait for the page to fully load and the embedded player to appear.
Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
Allow the extension to scan the page for the iframe player and detect available media streams.
Review the detected stream options, which will typically show m3u8 or mp4 sources.
Select the quality or stream variant you wish to download.
Click the download button to begin the export process.
Once complete, save the MP4 file to your desired location.

troubleshooting: The extension does not detect any media on the page. Make sure you are on a supported Perfect Girls video page with the /video/ / route pattern and that the embedded player has fully loaded.
The download fails or stops midway. Check your internet connection and ensure the stream source is still active. Some streams may have expiration windows.
The popup does not appear when I click the icon. Try refreshing the page and clicking the icon again. If the issue persists, reinstall the extension from the latest release.
I see an error about unsupported formats. The extension currently supports m3u8 and mp4 streams. If the page uses a different format, it may not be detectable.
The download starts but the file is corrupted. This can happen if the stream timed out during capture. Try the download again from the beginning.
